title: Eidolons Telemetry Turn Row v1
description: One row = one assistant turn captured at session Stop/SessionEnd. Honesty contract: every row carries source:audited|estimated — audited rows derive from the host's real session transcript (token counts are ground truth); estimated rows are proxy or heuristic approximations. The two are NEVER blended in reporting.

event_id.description: Deterministic dedup key: sha256(session_id|turn_index). Same turn on re-run produces the same event_id.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the assistant turn (from the transcript line).

source.description: audited = from the real session transcript (ground truth token counts); estimated = proxy/heuristic approximation. NEVER blend these in reporting.

host.description: Host that produced this turn (e.g. claude-code, codex, copilot, cursor, opencode).

turn_index.description: 0-based ordinal of this assistant turn within the session.

model.description: Model identifier from the transcript (e.g. claude-opus-4-8).

usage.description: Verbatim token counts from the transcript usage block. All four fields kept unsummed (cache reads are priced differently downstream).

self_reported_tokens.description: Total tokens as self-reported by the Eidolon via ECL (M2 cross-check). null if not available.

reconciliation_delta.description: audited_total - self_reported_tokens when both present, else null (M2 metric).

attribution.description: Composite attribution block: repo/branch/commit/pr/cwd/eidolon/tier/model and related identity keys. additionalProperties:true for forward-compat with P2 keys.

ecl_thread_id.description: ECL thread/envelope ID for M2 cross-check join. null in MLP (Phase D/later).
